final:
// // This module controls the fan speed based on a 3-bit binary input. The speed is set according to the input, with 000 being full speed, 001 being low speed, 010 being medium speed, 011 being high speed, and 100 being off.
module fan_speed_control (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input [2:0] speed_input,
    output reg [2:0] current_speed
);

always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
    if (reset) begin
        current_speed <= 3'b000; // Default to Off
    end else if (speed_input != current_speed) begin
        current_speed <= speed_input;
    end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module controls the fan speed based on a 3-bit binary input. The speed is set according to the input, with 000 being full speed, 001 being low speed, 010 being medium speed, 011 being high speed, and 100 being off.
